title: astragalus kentrophyta subsp. douglasii
intro: Astragalus kentrophyta subsp. douglasii, also known as Douglas's milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The health benefits of Douglas's milkvetch include its ability to enhance the body's natural defenses against infections and diseases, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Douglas's milkvetch is often used as a dried root or in combination with other herbs to create teas, capsules, or tinctures that can be used to support overall well-being.
